# Champions Data Portal (public mirror)

Read-only mirror of a personal Pokemon Champions data portal - Reg M-B usage
(Showdown ladder + the game's own Battle Data side by side), dex, speed
tiers, pairing cores, signal divergence, tournaments, ranks & VP.

**Generated site - do not edit.** Every publish force-overwrites this repo.
Ownership toggles are disabled on the public copy (they need the local
server).

Open it: https://mcbeer89.github.io/champions-portal/

Data sources: Smogon usage stats (smogon.com/stats), championsbattledata.com,
projectpokemon/champout (MIT), @pkmn/ps (MIT), Victory Road (tournaments).
